{{Infobox madra
| name = Flowing Flame
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Flowing Flame]] is a type of [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara uses [[Flowing Flame madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]]'s left hand was burned by [[Flowing Flame madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“Victory,” the Ninecloud Soul declared, and only then did the Flowing Flame madra from Sophara taper off.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
